+def _minimum_cycle_basis_component_ordered_graph_local(G, component):
+    ordered = _nx.Graph()
+    component_nodes = set(component)
+
+    for node in G:
+        if node in component_nodes:
+            ordered.add_node(node, **dict(G.nodes[node]))
+
+    for u, v, data in G.edges(data=True):
+        if u in component_nodes and v in component_nodes:
+            ordered.add_edge(u, v, **dict(data))
+
+    return ordered
+

@@ -61,6 +61,26 @@ def test_minimum_cycle_basis_native_avoids_networkx(monkeypatch):

+def test_minimum_cycle_basis_weighted_order_matches_networkx():
+    graph = fnx.Graph()
+    expected = nx.Graph()
+
+    for u, v, weight in [
+        ("a", "b", 1),
+        ("b", "c", 1),
+        ("c", "d", 1),
+        ("d", "a", 1),
+        ("a", "c", 2),
+    ]:
+        graph.add_edge(u, v, weight=weight)
+        expected.add_edge(u, v, weight=weight)
+
+    assert fnx.minimum_cycle_basis(graph, weight="weight") == nx.minimum_cycle_basis(
+        expected,
+        weight="weight",
+    )
+
